titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 162: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 162. (A.R. No. 689 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, Gaṇēśa shrine, Neḍuṅgaḷanāthasvāmi temple.

This records a gift of twelve sheep by two shepherds Nattan Kāri and Māṟaṉ Valiyaṉ for the supply of 12 nāḻi of ghee to burn a lamp during the day of the festival in the Chittirai month in the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam in Kavīra-nāḍu. Māḍalan Chandraśekharan and his brothers and some others who were the temple officials received the sheep and undertook to supply the 12 nāḻi of ghee as the annual contribution.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 368.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñ
cāvatu kaviranāṭṭut tiruneṭuṅkaḷattu mahāde
varkku manṟāṭi nattaṅkāri vaitta Āṭu pa
ttum manṟāṭi māṟaṉ valiyaṉ vaitta Ā
ṭu Iraṇṭum cittirait tiruviḻāvukku tiru
viḷakku ney Aṭṭuvatāṉa ney paṉniru nā
ḻi Ippanṉiru nāḻiyum cantirātittavaṟ
Āṭṭaivaṭṭam Aṭṭuvatāka Icaiñcu koṇ
ṭa Āṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu Ivvāṭu paṉṉiraṇṭuṅ koṇ
ṭom Ittirukkoyilluṭaiya māṭalan canti
racekaraṉum tampimārum māṭalan pūti pul
m māṭilaṉ naṉti vaṭukaṉum Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
